measured.transcript: He hoped there would be stew for dinner, turnips and carrots and bruised potatoes and fat mutton pieces to beadled out in thick peppered flour fatten sauce stuff it into you his belly counllselled him after nightfall the yellow lamps would light up here and there the squalid quarter of the broths Hello Berty. Any good in yourmind number ten Freshanelli is waiting on you goodnight husband the mus came nearer and he recalled the words, the words of Shelle's fragment upon the moon wand wandering companionless pale for weariness the dull light fell Upon the page whereon equation began began to unfold itself slowly and to spread its widing tail Old lucid indifference reigned in his soul In which ardour extinguished itself was a cold indifferent knowledge of himself By an alms given to a beggar whose blessing he fled from he might wearily to win for himself someas of actual grace

finals.transcript: He hoped there would be stew for dinner, turnips and carrots and bruised potatoes and fat mutton pieces to beadled out in thick peppered flour fatten sauce stuff it into you his belly counllselled him after nightfall the yellow lamps would light up here and there the squalid quarter of the broths

Hello Berty. Any good in yourmind number ten Freshanelli is waiting on you goodnight husband the mus came nearer and he recalled the words, the words of Shelle's fragment upon the moon wand wandering companionless pale for weariness the dull light fell
Upon the page whereon equation began began to unfold itself slowly and to spread its widing tail
Old lucid indifference reigned in his soul
In which ardour extinguished itself was a cold indifferent knowledge of himself
By an alms given to a beggar whose blessing he fled from he might wearily to win for himself someas of actual grace
